marketing_seeds: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late orders and missed discounts. We automate the conversion of delivery receipts into formatted reports instead of manual entry into spreadsheets.
Manual processing of vendor delivery receipts leads to time-consuming report generation.
